name: how-long
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man facing camera, eyes searching. Dark suit, composed exterior. Cool blue room lighting behind. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: How long were you waiting outside?

name: admission
prompt: Close-up. Woman's face, composure flickering — satisfaction visible. Dark hair swept back, knowing expression. Cool light, slight smile. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Valeria
dialogue.text: Long enough to hear the argument.

name: collar-reach
prompt: Medium shot from side. Woman in navy uniform reaching toward dark-haired man's collar. Her hand approaching his neck. Intimate distance between them. Cool room lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: soft fabric rustle, intimate and deliberate
